section.heading: Preservation of existing appointing authorities
section.chapeau: This chapter shall not be held or considered to change or otherwise affect—

paragraph.content: any authority to establish positions under the House of Representatives which are not within the purview of this chapter, or
any authority to make appointments to positions under the House of Representatives, irrespective of whether such positions are within the purview of this chapter.

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: This chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning Pub. L. 88–652, Oct. 13, 1964, 78 Stat. 1079, known as the House Employees Position Classification Act, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under section 291 of this title and Tables.

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective Jan. 1, 1965, see section 17 of Pub. L. 88–652, set out as a note under section 291 of this title.
